app: Employee & Family Implant Application Management v2
tester: Codex runtime smoke test with authenticated Yeeflow tenant
summary: The v2 package imported successfully and passed local validation plus focused runtime tests for dashboards, form load, requester/applicant snapshots, product sublist totals, quota aggregation with prior usage, HR review approval routing, HR return to applicant, applicant resubmission, duplicate-prevention for Family Quota Usage during resubmission, custom-package Finance routing, Finance return to applicant, final Finance approval, persistence, and the over-quota warning/block path.

notes: Warnings are known generated-form/workflow shape warnings and did not block local validation.
Focused inspection confirmed safe FlowKey EIX, no corrupted prefix keys, dateDiff raw year usage, query filter blocks, submit guard continue:true, return workflow nodes, and two dashboard pages.

import.evidence: Package imported as Employee & Family Implant Application Management v2.

homeDashboard.evidence: Home dashboard rendered with KPI cards and guidance.

hrOperationsDashboard.evidence: HR Operations Dashboard rendered with core KPI cards and operational queue guidance.

approvalFormOpen.evidence: Implant Application Request opened on the New tab.

requesterApplicantDefault.evidence: Requester / Applicant defaulted to Renger from Yeeflow.

applicantSnapshotsReadonly.evidence: Applicant name, employee ID, department, boarding date, user status, email, and line manager displayed as non-editable snapshot text.

productSublist.evidence: Added Standard Implant Package row; product name/type/unit price autofilled; row subtotal became 2500; summary became 2500.00.

totalApplicationAmount.evidence: Total Application Amount updated to 2500.00 from Product Selection summary.

familyQuotaCheck.evidence: Family quota check showed annual quota 15000.00, remaining after 12500.00, eligible, and quota exceeded No for a 2500 family request.

submitValidPath.evidence: Submit completed and Yeeflow showed Thank you for submitting this form.

hrReviewTask.evidence: New HR Review task appeared in Pending tasks for the submitted request.

hrApprovalStandardPath.evidence: Approving HR Review for a non-custom family request succeeded and removed the task from Pending tasks.

implantApplicationsPersistence.evidence: Implant Applications row was created with application no, applicant employee ID 001, applicant name, Family type, Has Custom Package Product No, and USD 2500.00 total.

familyQuotaUsagePersistence.evidence: Family Quota Usage row was created with usage/application no, applicant employee ID 001, applicant name, quota cycle key 1, quota cycle no 1.00, custom flag No, and USD 2500.00 amount.

secondRequestIncludesPriorUsage.evidence: A new request form loaded after the first approval showed Used Quota Before 2500.00, confirming the prior approved usage row was included by the quota query.

attachmentVerificationFields.evidence: HR Review page displayed Attachment Verification Status, Missing Attachment Flag, HR Verification Flag, Attachment Requirement Scenario, and review notes fields.

returnResubmission.evidence: HR Review returned family request 20559911459507527722026051700002 to Applicant Correction / Resubmission. The applicant correction task opened for the same request and completion routed it back to HR Review.

quotaDuplicatePreventionOnResubmission.evidence: After resubmission, Family Quota Usage showed one row for request 20559911459507527722026051700002 and one row for the earlier request; no duplicate usage row was created for the resubmitted request.

financeRouteCustomPackage.evidence: Self + Custom Package request 20559911459507527722026051700003 set Includes Custom Package Product to Yes. HR Review approval routed the same request to Finance/Benefits Review.

financeReturn.evidence: Finance/Benefits Review returned request 20559911459507527722026051700003 to Applicant Correction / Resubmission. After applicant resubmission, the request routed back through HR Review and then Finance/Benefits Review.

overQuotaWarningBlock.evidence: Family + Custom over-quota request with Total Application Amount 12000.00 showed Used Quota Before 5000.00, Remaining Quota After -2000.00, and Quota Exceeded Yes. Submit displayed the quota-exceeded warning dialog; Cancel returned to the same new request form without submitting.

financeFinalCompletion.evidence: After the Finance return/resubmission loop for request 20559911459507527722026051700003, final HR approval routed to Finance/Benefits Review and final Finance approval completed the task queue.
